title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. scoliodon
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. scoliodon, also known as Scolymus, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that has been used for its medicinal properties in traditional herbal remedies. It has been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium nigrescens subsp. scoliodon can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
